capabilities: Ensure seamless integration of modular architecture and AI prompting knowledge bases to optimize system design and functionality.

procedure.action: Extract key modular components using domain-driven design principles from both knowledge bases using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Run a dependency analysis on identified components to detect integration points using static code analysis tools using domain-appropriate tooling; validate output against the defined schema; assert error_count = 0; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Merge artifacts by aligning data models and interfaces, utilizing API Gateway for unified access by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) ≠ hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log.
Validate merged outputs through automated integration tests using a CI/CD pipeline with >90% test coverage.

Classify results using machine learning models to identify successful integrations and areas needing refinement using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; record confidence_score >= 0.7.

summary: Integrate modular architecture principles with AI prompting knowledge bases by merging insights, validating outputs, and aligning workflows for enhanced system design.
title: Modular Architecture with AI Prompting Knowledge Base Integration

failureConditions: Incompatible data models lead to integration failures; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Merged outputs do not meet performance benchmarks; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Misalignment of workflows causes operational inefficiencies; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: Merged system maintains response time under 200ms for 95% of requests; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Successful deployment without rollback in production environment; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
